description:
## Background

The WebDriver harness passes scenario, phase, fixture paths, and store
paths between three Node processes through raw string env vars whose
meaning is implicit at every call site. This is a **Primitive
Obsession / Mysterious Name** smell (Fowler, *Refactoring*).

Three independent places read the same environment contract:

- `e2e/issue-list/scripts/run-scenario.ts:73-75` declares the
  `Scenario` union and `isScenario` type guard, and parses the CLI
  argument.
- `wdio.issue-list.conf.ts:33-49` redeclares the `Scenario` mapping
  inline (`rawScenario`, chained `if/else if`), reads
  `BEADSMITH_E2E_WORKSPACE_A`, `BEADSMITH_E2E_WORKSPACE_B`,
  `BEADSMITH_E2E_WORKSPACE_B_SECOND`, and
  `BEADSMITH_WORKSPACE_STORE_PATH` as `string | undefined`, and
  validates each one with its own ad-hoc error string.
- `e2e/issue-list/issue-list.restoration.spec.ts` and
  `e2e/issue-list/issue-list.atomic-switch.spec.ts` each read
  `process.env.BEADSMITH_E2E_PHASE ?? "1"` and branch on
  `phase === "1" | "2"` inline inside every `it()`.

There is no single function that produces the typed
`{ scenario, phase, fixtureA, fixtureB?, fixtureBSecond?, storePath }`
shape the specs actually need.

## What to build

One typed parser for harness inputs that produces a fully validated
object. Specs and the wdio config consume this parser instead of raw
`process.env.*` reads.

## Technical Approach

This is a **wide refactor** — its blast radius fans across the
harness and four spec files. Sequence as expand–contract per the
project template:

1. **Expand** (`bsm-kia.12.1`) — add typed `Scenario`, `Phase`,
   `HarnessInputs`, and the parsers to
   `e2e/issue-list/scripts/run-scenario.ts` (or a sibling helper).
   No callers yet.
2. **Migrate** — replace `process.env.*` reads one file at a time:
   - `bsm-kia.12.2` — `wdio.issue-list.conf.ts` (blocked by .1)
   - `bsm-kia.12.3` — `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts` (blocked by .1)
   - `bsm-kia.12.4` — `issue-list.atomic-switch.spec.ts` (blocked by
     .1)
3. **Contract** (`bsm-kia.12.5`) — delete the raw env-var reads from
   specs and wdio config; verify
   `rg "process\.env\.BEADSMITH_E2E_"` returns zero hits in those
   files (blocked by .2, .3, .4).

## Considerations

- Don't break CI between batches. The launcher remains the only env
  producer; consumers switch one at a time.
- The typed shape must match what the existing wdio config validates
  (it throws if `fixtureA` / `fixtureB` / `storePath` are missing).
  Use the same consolidated error message.
- This refactor does not rename env vars; only the consumption side
  becomes typed. The launcher CLI surface (positional args) stays
  unchanged.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `Scenario`, `Phase`, and `HarnessInputs` types and
      `parseScenario` / `parsePhase` / `parseHarnessEnvironment`
      parsers exist in `e2e/issue-list/scripts/run-scenario.ts` (or
      sibling).
- [ ] `wdio.issue-list.conf.ts` and every spec consume typed harness
      inputs through the shared parser; no spec file or wdio config
      reads `process.env.BEADSMITH_E2E_*` directly.
- [ ] Missing or unknown env values fail with one consolidated error
      that lists every invalid input, not one error per `if`.
- [ ] `rg "process\.env\.BEADSMITH_E2E_"` returns zero hits in
      `wdio.issue-list.conf.ts` and `e2e/issue-list/*.spec.ts`.
- [ ] `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` and
      `pnpm e2e:issue-list:isolation` pass.

## Test Plan

- Vitest unit tests for the parsers: each accepts its valid inputs,
  throws on unknown, and `parseHarnessEnvironment` returns a complete
  object when all env vars are present or throws a single
  consolidated error when any are missing.
- Run `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` and
  `pnpm e2e:issue-list:isolation` to prove the migrated shape works
  end to end after every migrate batch.

## Sub-issues

- `bsm-kia.12.1` — Expand: add typed parser in `run-scenario.ts`
- `bsm-kia.12.2` — Migrate `wdio.issue-list.conf.ts`
- `bsm-kia.12.3` — Migrate `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts`
- `bsm-kia.12.4` — Migrate `issue-list.atomic-switch.spec.ts`
- `bsm-kia.12.5` — Contract: delete raw reads, verify `rg`
title: Replace raw env-var primitives with typed Scenario/Phase/fixture inputs
